message:
fix(installer): remove accidental conflict markers

The install.sh file had unresolved git conflict markers that were
accidentally committed. This removes them.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
